name: sql_raw
summary: Executes a raw SQL query for each message and replaces the message with the query result. Supports PostgreSQL, SQLite, MySQL, and others.

driver.description: Database driver. Use "postgres" for PostgreSQL, "sqlite" for SQLite.

query.description: SQL query to execute. Use ? (or $1 for postgres) as placeholders for args_mapping values.

args_mapping.description: Bloblang mapping that produces an array of values to bind to query placeholders.

unsafe_dynamic_query.description: Allow Bloblang interpolation directly in the query string. Enables dynamic queries but risks SQL injection — use with caution.

init_statement.description: SQL statement executed once when the connection is established.
